calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Appointing Guardian Ad Litem To Execute A Disclaimer On Behalf Of A Minor (Probate Code Section 277,1003 And 17200)
Off Calendar Jul-29-2014 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Stephen Gould for (petitioner) James Wechsler.

The court stated that it still remains reluctant to grant the petition as the mother is not an independent guardian ad litem to execute the disclaimer and that it is not satisfied that someone can disclaim an interest and then resurrect it. Mr. Gould stated that the guardian ad litem has free reign to protect the interest of the minor and that they were trying to save money. He then presented further argument regarding California statute and federal statute regarding disclaimers. The petition for order appointing guardian ad litem to execute a disclaimer on behalf of a minor as well as the ex parte petition for order appointing guardian ad litem are denied. Counsel is to prepare orders for both matters.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)

Petition For Order Appointing Guardian Ad Litem To Execute A Disclaimer On Behalf Of A Minor (Probate Code Section 277,1003 And 17200)
Off Calendar Jul-08-2014 Continued To Jul-29-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Stephen Gould for James Wechsler.

The Court stated that it had never heard of a disclaimer during the lifetime of someone, that it has never seen a partial or contingent disclaimer, and asked why it is in Jennifer's best interest to disclaim 1/3 interest of the property. Mr. Gould presented oral argument to support his position, stated that it is only a disclaimer for the term during the Father's lifetime, provided background, spoke of re-assessment rules, stated that it is not giving up any right of remainder, that it is a savings of marketable assets of $25,000.00, explained the difference between Federal law and California law regarding disclaimers, referred to different sections of the Trust instrument, stated that he could add/change language in the proposed order, etc. The Petition for Order Appointing Guardian As Litem to Execute a Disclaimer on Behalf of a Minor was continued to July 29, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for revised proposed alternate orders.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)
